campbell.title: Campbell City Council — May 5, 2026
campbell.summary: The Campbell City Council met to review transportation funding investments, approve a new policy restricting use of city property for federal civil enforcement activities, and discuss efforts to fill open city positions and improve employee retention.
keyTopics: Santa Clara Valley Transportation Authority investment report for March 2026
New policy prohibiting city property use for federal civil enforcement
City job vacancies and recruitment/retention strategies

saratoga.title: Saratoga City Council — April 15, 2026
saratoga.summary: The City Council held a public hearing to address concerns about cleaning up hazardous conditions on properties identified by the County, and voted to move forward with the abatement work. The council also adopted a new technology policy and approved a process for residents to request accommodations.
keyTopics: Hazardous property abatement ordered on County-identified locations
Public hearing to review objections to the cleanup work
New Technology Disruption Policy adopted
Process established for residents to request reasonable accommodations

los-gatos.title: Los Gatos Town Council — May 19, 2026
los-gatos.summary: The Los Gatos Town Council met on May 19, 2026, to approve financial records and meeting minutes from earlier in the month. The council also authorized several contracts and agreements, including road paving work and a donation of emergency medical equipment, plus approved a list of projects for the upcoming fiscal year.
keyTopics: Approved O'Grady Paving construction contract for road work
Accepted donation of automated external defibrillators (AED)
Reviewed March 2026 financial and investment report
Authorized multi-year service agreement (five-year term)
Approved fiscal year 2026-27 project list and filed grant applications

san-jose.title: San José City Council — May 20, 2026
san-jose.summary: The San José City Council held a planning meeting to organize upcoming council sessions. They cancelled their May 26 meeting and reviewed what items should go on the June 2 agenda, including decisions about scheduling and special rules for certain discussion topics.
keyTopics: Cancelled May 26, 2026 council meeting
Building June 2 draft agenda with new items
Neighborhood Services and Education Committee work plan update
Rules and Open Government Committee work plan review
Council-sponsored community events approval

mountain-view.title: Mountain View City Council — May 20, 2026
mountain-view.summary: The Mountain View City Council met on May 20, 2026, to approve meeting minutes and hear public comments from residents. The council selected and recommended applicants for the Youth Advisory Committee for the 2026-27 fiscal year.
keyTopics: Youth Advisory Committee positions being filled for 2026-27
Public comment period for residents to address the council
Review and approval of previous meeting minutes

sunnyvale.title: Sunnyvale City Council — May 19, 2026
sunnyvale.summary: The Sunnyvale City Council held a regular meeting on May 19, 2026, where they recognized Asian Pacific American Heritage Month and Affordable Housing Month. The council convened with a flag salute and reviewed meeting minutes from April.
keyTopics: Recognition of Asian Pacific American Heritage Month
Recognition of Affordable Housing Month
April meeting minutes approval

cupertino.title: Cupertino City Council — May 19, 2026
cupertino.summary: The Cupertino City Council met to update the city's Health and Safety plans for 2015-2040, recognized the Public Works Department for their work during Public Works Week, and celebrated Asian American Pacific Islander Month.
keyTopics: Update to Health and Safety Element of the General Plan
Public Works Department recognition (roads, trees, facilities, transportation, sustainability)
Asian American Pacific Islander Month celebration

santa-clara.title: Santa Clara City Council — May 20, 2026
santa-clara.summary: Santa Clara is holding Charter Review Committee meetings where residents can attend in person or join online via Zoom. The city is accepting written public comments from residents who email before the meeting deadline.
keyTopics: Charter Review Committee meetings available in-person and online
Public can submit written comments via email to cityattorney@santaclaraca.gov by 10 a.m. the day before the meeting
Zoom participation option: Meeting ID 861 2740 8402 or phone dial-in 1-669-444-9171

milpitas.title: Milpitas City Council — May 19, 2026
milpitas.summary: The Milpitas City Council held a meeting on May 19, 2026, to address several planning and administrative matters. The council considered new ordinances, approved a development permit amendment, confirmed property assessments, and appointed a permanent city manager.
keyTopics: New ordinance proposals related to city code updates
Development permit amendment and tentative map approval
Property assessment confirmation
Permanent city manager appointment

palo-alto.title: Palo Alto City Council — May 15, 2026
palo-alto.summary: The city council discussed plans to help Palo Alto residents switch from gas to electric heating and appliances to comply with air quality regulations. The council reviewed proposed principles and guidelines for electrification assistance programs that would support homeowners making this transition.
keyTopics: Residential electrification assistance programs for homeowners
Compliance with Air District regulations on gas appliances
Proposed principles to guide electrification initiatives
Staff presentation and environmental review status
